programs.title: For My Man
programs.desc: An ambitious single mother with a bright future finds love in a man with a troubled past. When he is linked to murder, she stands by him. And as evidence mounts, loyalty turns to liability as she faces a harsh truth: love could cost her everything.

programs.title: For My Man
programs.desc: When a 26 year old woman falls for a handsome 28 year old, she believes she's found a man who will truly love and protect her; but when his protection comes with dire consequences, she'll have to weigh the cost of his security versus her own freedom.

programs.title: Fatal Attraction
programs.desc: A hopeful New Year's Eve turns into a tragedy when a man is found shot inside his home; is this just a devastating accident involving a neighborhood celebration?; is it possible this man was the target of a calculated attack?

programs.title: For My Man
programs.desc: Blinded by love and addiction, Laura Walton follows Deon Batton down a path of armed robbery and deception; when the law catches up, she realizes the price of devotion can be life-changing.

programs.title: In Broad Daylight
programs.desc: A man searches for his cousin who was kidnapped by her obsessive ex-boyfriend.
